languages.text: "Пробудившись, священный археотех вернул к бодрствованию еще несколько машин. Выполняя для них ритуалы диагностики, техножрецы обнаружили, что за одним из устройств скрывается потайная дверь, украшенная старинно начертанным гербом фон Валанциусов. Стоило им попытаться войти, как путь преградил генетический страж. Он отказался открывать проход кому-либо, кроме Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса или его наследника".

traits.locale_text: "Пробудившись, священный археотех вернул к бодрствованию еще несколько машин. Выполняя для них ритуалы диагностики, техножрецы обнаружили, что за одним из устройств скрывается потайная дверь, украшенная старинно начертанным гербом фон Валанциусов. Стоило им попытаться войти, как путь преградил генетический страж. Он отказался открывать проход кому-либо, кроме Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса или его наследника".

languages.text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

languages.text: “那件神圣的远古科技一苏醒，便又唤醒了数台机器。技术神甫们执行完诊断仪式后，在其中一台设备后面发现了一扇秘门——门上刻着古老的冯·瓦兰修斯家徽。技术神甫们刚想进去，就被一名基因守卫挡住了去路。它拒绝为除行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯及其继承人以外的任何人开启那扇门。”
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

traits.locale_text: “那件神圣的远古科技一苏醒，便又唤醒了数台机器。技术神甫们执行完诊断仪式后，在其中一台设备后面发现了一扇秘门——门上刻着古老的冯·瓦兰修斯家徽。技术神甫们刚想进去，就被一名基因守卫挡住了去路。它拒绝为除行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯及其继承人以外的任何人开启那扇门。”

languages.text: «Tras despertar, la sagrada arqueotecnología reanimó también a otras máquinas. Después de los diagnósticos rituales, los tecnosacerdotes descubrieron una puerta secreta tras uno de los dispositivos, con un antiguo escudo de armas de los von Valancius. En cuanto los tecnosacerdotes intentaron entrar, un guardián genético les bloqueó el paso. Solo está dispuesto a abrirle la puerta al Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius o su heredero».
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

traits.locale_text: «Tras despertar, la sagrada arqueotecnología reanimó también a otras máquinas. Después de los diagnósticos rituales, los tecnosacerdotes descubrieron una puerta secreta tras uno de los dispositivos, con un antiguo escudo de armas de los von Valancius. En cuanto los tecnosacerdotes intentaron entrar, un guardián genético les bloqueó el paso. Solo está dispuesto a abrirle la puerta al Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius o su heredero».

languages.text: « En revenant à la vie, la relique archéotechnologique sacrée a réveillé plusieurs autres machines. Après avoir réalisé des diagnostics rituels, les technoprêtres ont découvert une porte secrète derrière l'un des appareils. Celle-ci portait d'anciennes armoiries des von Valancius. Lorsque les technoprêtres ont tenté d'entrer, un gardien génétique leur a barré le passage. Il a refusé d'ouvrir la porte à quiconque excepté le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, ou son héritier. »
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

traits.locale_text: « En revenant à la vie, la relique archéotechnologique sacrée a réveillé plusieurs autres machines. Il a refusé d'ouvrir la porte à quiconque excepté le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius, ou son héritier. »

languages.text: "Kutsal arkeotek, uyanınca birkaç makineyi daha uyandırdı. Teşhis ayinlerini gerçekleştirdikten sonra Tekno Rahipler, cihazlardan birinin arkasında gizli bir kapı keşfetti. Üzerine kadim von Valancius arması kazınmıştı. Tekno Rahipler içeri girmeye çalışır çalışmaz genetik bir muhafız yolu kapattı. Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius veya onun vârisi dışında kimseye kapıyı açmayacaklarmış."
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

Üzerine kadim von Valancius arması kazınmıştı. Tekno Rahipler içeri girmeye çalışır çalışmaz genetik bir muhafız yolu kapattı. Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius veya onun vârisi dışında kimseye kapıyı açmayacaklarmış."

languages.text: "Als er erwacht war, stellte der heilige Archäotech die volle Wachsamkeit mehrerer anderer Maschinen wieder her. Nach der Durchführung einiger Diagnoserituale entdeckten die Techpriester hinter einem der Geräte eine Geheimtür, die mit dem alten Wappen derer von Valancius verziert war. Als die Techpriester versuchten, sich Zugang zu verschaffen, blockierte ihnen ein genetischer Wächter den Weg. Er weigerte sich, die Tür für jemand anderen als Freihändler Seberian oder seinen Erben zu öffnen."
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."

traits.locale_text: "Als er erwacht war, stellte der heilige Archäotech die volle Wachsamkeit mehrerer anderer Maschinen wieder her. Nach der Durchführung einiger Diagnoserituale entdeckten die Techpriester hinter einem der Geräte eine Geheimtür, die mit dem alten Wappen derer von Valancius verziert war. Er weigerte sich, die Tür für jemand anderen als Freihändler Seberian oder seinen Erben zu öffnen."

languages.text: 「聖なるアーケオテクノロジーが目を覚ました時、数多くの機械が再び活動を始めた。テクプリストたちは診断の儀式を行い、その結果、ある装置の背後に隠された秘密の扉を発見した。その扉には、古代のフォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が刻まれていた。テクプリストたちが扉を開こうとした瞬間、遺伝子守護者が扉の前に現れ、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の流罪商人セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウス本人かその子孫以外には扉を開かないと宣言した。」
languages.original_text: "Upon awakening, the sacred archeotech brought several more machines back to wakefulness. After performing diagnostic rituals, the Tech-Priests discovered a secret door behind one of the devices — it was inscribed with an ancient von Valancius coat of arms. As soon as the Tech-Priests tried to enter, a genetic guardian blocked the way. It refused to open the door to anyone but Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius or his heir."
